headline: Smoke-test harness — workshop-internal, no raiz-visible change
skip_reason: lib/hook-utils.sh and lib/hook-logging.sh changes add the CLAUDE_TOOLKIT_HOOK_RETURN_OUTPUT flag and the kind:smoketest trap branch. Both are gated on the env var being set, which only the workshop-internal smoke runner sets. Raiz consumers don't ship the runner, fixtures, or the validator's V18/V19/V20 — so on raiz the flag is unset, the branch is dormant, and behavior is identical to 2.80.0.
